# AudioObjectIsPropertySettable(_:_:_:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Audio ](/documentation/coreaudio)

- [ AudioObjectIsPropertySettable(_:_:_:) ](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjectispropertysettable(_:_:_:))

-  AudioObjectIsPropertySettable(_:_:_:) 

Function# AudioObjectIsPropertySettable(_:_:_:)

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.4+

```
func AudioObjectIsPropertySettable(
    _ inObjectID: AudioObjectID,
    _ inAddress: UnsafePointer<AudioObjectPropertyAddress>,
    _ outIsSettable: UnsafeMutablePointer<DarwinBoolean>
) -> OSStatus
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjectispropertysettable(_:_:_:)#parameters)

`inObjectID`The AudioObject to query.

`inAddress`An AudioObjectPropertyAddress indicating which property is being queried.

`outIsSettable`A Boolean indicating whether or not the property can be set.

## [Return Value](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjectispropertysettable(_:_:_:)#return-value)

An OSStatus indicating success or failure.

## [Discussion](/documentation/coreaudio/audioobjectispropertysettable(_:_:_:)#discussion)

Queries an AudioObject about whether or not the given property can be set using AudioObjectSetPropertyData.
